questions.text: Which of the following are sets?
options: The collection of all months of a year
The collection of most talented writers
The collection of all prime numbers between 1 and 100
The collection of best cricket batsmen
questions.correctAnswer: The collection of all months of a year and The collection of all prime numbers between 1 and 100
questions.explanation: A set is a well-defined collection. 'Most talented' and 'best' are not well-defined criteria.

questions.text: The set {x : x is an integer and -3 ≤ x < 5} in roster form is:
questions.explanation: The set includes all integers from -3 (inclusive) to 5 (exclusive), so -3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4.

questions.text: An empty set has no elements.
questions.explanation: An empty set (denoted by ∅ or {}) is a set with no elements. It's also called the void set.
A ∩ B (A intersection B) contains elements common to both A and B. Here, 2 and 3 are common.
